scripts.validate:all: npm run check && npm run validate && npm run validate:phase23 && npm run validate:phase4 && npm run test:phase4-import && npm run test:model && npm run validate:phases5-13 && npm run validate:repair && npm run validate:truth
scripts.test:phase4-import: rm -rf data/runtime/phase4-test && python3 scripts/phase4/import_official_extract.py data/fixtures/phase4/official_extract_sample.json --source-id fixture-court-export --out data/runtime/phase4-test && python3 scripts/phase4/validate_public_projection.py data/runtime/phase4-test/normalized_cases.json
